Off Calendar May-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Cohen, Esq (800-492-2657) specially appearing for Plaintiff/Moving party Kap Investments, LLC.
No other Appearances.

Hearing is held. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF KAP INVESTMENTS, LLC's Plaintiffs Motion To Set Aside And Vacate The Notice Of Settlement Of Entire Case is Granted. No Opposition filed. Order is signed in Open Court. "It is hereby ordered that the notice of settlement of entire case filed on September 13. 2010 in the above captioned matter be set aside and vacated...." (see scanned order for details) Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
